# validate.per_base_accuracy { #tslai.validate.per_base_accuracy }

```python
tslai.validate.per_base_accuracy(
    tracks,
    truth_states,
    samples=None,
    exclude_missing=True,
)
```

Span-weighted per-base painting accuracy.

Computes the span-weighted fraction of the genome where the ``argmax`` of the
posterior matches the truth.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**tracks**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tslai.output.Segment`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Posterior segment tracks per sample (e.g. from :func:`tslai.output.posterior_table`).

<code>[**truth_states**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`), [int](`int`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   True ancestry-state tracts per sample (e.g. from :func:`map_truth`).

<code>[**samples**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Samples to score; defaults to all keys of ``tracks``.

<code>[**exclude_missing**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If True, skip segments tagged :data:`tslai.output.MISSING_INFO`.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Span-weighted accuracy, or ``nan`` if no span was scored.
